NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_AS_WATER_SEEKS_EQUILIB: During your turn, whenever your HP changes, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold].
Above the scales lies absolute justice.
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_ORATRICE_TIME.title: Oratrice Time
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_ORATRICE_TIME.descript: During your turn, whenever your HP changes, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold]. At the start of each combat, [gold]Surge[/gold] 2 twice.
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_ORATRICE_TIME.flavor: The day of oracle, the time of judgment...
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_GAVEL.title: Gavel
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_GAVEL.description: At the start of your turn, apply 1 stack of [gold]Contempt of Court[/gold] to all enemies.
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_MONOCLE.title: Monocle
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_MONOCLE.description: At the end of combat, if your HP is less than or equal to [blue]20%[/blue] of your Max HP, randomly [gold]upgrade[/gold] a card in your deck.
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_MONOCLE.flavor: A monocle that once belonged to a certain "evil dragon", accompanied by a grand dream, burst forth from the tower.
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_PLUMULE.title: Plumule
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_PLUMULE.description: The first time you lose HP during your turn each round, gain that much [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_PLUMULE.flavor: A bird feather that once adorned someone's hat, drifting here with a light boat song.
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_BRAVE_TEA_CUP.title: Brave Tea Cup
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_BRAVE_TEA_CUP.descript: You cannot rest at rest sites. After every 2 combats, gain [blue]3[/blue] Max HP.
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_BRAVE_TEA_CUP.flavor: A tea cup that once shared leisurely afternoons with the "Brave", now alone in the tower reminiscing those times after the "Brave"'s passing.
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_STOPPED_POCKET_WATCH.d: At the start of your 4th turn, draw 4 cards and [gold]Surge[/gold] 4.
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_STOPPED_POCKET_WATCH.f: A gift once given to a prodigy, which stopped ticking many years ago while sleeping in the tower.
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_NARCISSUS.title: Narcissus
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_NARCISSUS.description: After you lose HP 2 times, draw 1 card.
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_NARCISSUS.flavor: A flower that once withered in a grand story, now blooming again in the dreams depicted by the tower.
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_CREEPY_BRANCH.title: Creepy Branch
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_CREEPY_BRANCH.descript: Whenever you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card, add a random card to your hand. It costs [blue]0[/blue] this turn.
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_CREEPY_BRANCH.flavor: This branch seems to be whispering something, but you can't make it out...
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_STATUE_FRAGMENT.title: Statue Fragment
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_STATUE_FRAGMENT.descri: At the start of the 3rd turn of each combat, apply 1 turn of [gold]Slow[/gold] to all enemies.
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_STATUE_FRAGMENT.flavor: A fragment fallen from an ancient statue, still retaining some mysterious power.
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_POTION_SPIRIT.title: Potion Spirit
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_POTION_SPIRIT.descript: After you use a total of 4 potions in combat, gain 1 stack of [gold]Intangible[/gold].
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_POTION_SPIRIT.flavor: A soul that has toiled tirelessly throughout its life, entrusting you with the rest of its existence after finding peace.
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_ETERNAL_STONE.descript: At the end of each combat, randomly enchant an Attack card in your deck with [gold]Heavy[/gold].
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_ETERNAL_STONE.title: Eternal Stone
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_ETERNAL_STONE.flavor: A stone of incredible weight, making your bag much heavier.
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_SOUL_GRAFT_RELIC.title: Soul Graft
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_SOUL_GRAFT_RELIC.descr: At the start of combat, shuffle [blue]3[/blue] random Attack cards into your draw pile. They cost [blue]0[/blue] this combat.
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_SOUL_GRAFT_RELIC.flavo: A wondrous creature born in a cocoon, forming an unbreakable bond with you on this journey up the tower.
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_SHATTERED_CROWN.title: Shattered Crown
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_SHATTERED_CROWN.descri: You cannot obtain card rewards after combat. Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} at the start of each turn.
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_SHATTERED_CROWN.flavor: A crown that once symbolized supreme power, now in your hands as a fine for sinful thoughts.
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_SEA_FOAM_MAILBOX.title: Sea Foam Mailbox
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_SEA_FOAM_MAILBOX.descr: At the start of each combat, draw [blue]2[/blue] cards and transform any number of cards in your hand into [gold]Melusine Sticker[/gold].
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_SEA_FOAM_MAILBOX.flavo: A small mailbox gifted by the sea elves, where you can always find letters from the Melusines (especially Percival).
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_EXCUSE_NOTE.title: Excuse Note
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_EXCUSE_NOTE.descriptio: Rest sites will appear in [gold]?[/gold] rooms.
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_EXCUSE_NOTE.flavor: A note you wrote and approved yourself, allowing you to find a reason to rest in the tower.
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_KINDRED_FRUIT_BASKET.f: A basket filled with kindred fruits, each one brimming with the sweetness of life.
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_BOTTLED_SAND_CAVERN.de: At the start of the 30th round of each combat, kill all enemies. At the start of combat, shuffle 6 [gold]Sand Vortex[/gold] into your draw pile.
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_BOTTLED_SAND_CAVERN.fl: Grains of sand swirl silently in the bottle; after thirty rounds, all falls silent.
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_INJECT_REAGENT.title: Inject Reagent
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_INJECT_REAGENT.descrip: Set your Max HP to half. When you would take fatal damage, heal to full HP instead (can trigger 2 times).
NEUVILLETTE_RELIC_INJECT_REAGENT.flavor: The liquid in the syringe glows with an eerie light—lifesaver or death sentence, all in one prick.
